visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Inside a brightly lit retail store with crowded shelves, a woman wearing a grey striped button-up shirt and a grey bucket hat browses the snack section. She reaches for and examines a pink bag of strawberry-flavored cotton candy, looking closely at the packaging details while standing in front of numerous colorful snack items. (2) Another woman dressed in a dark blue off-the-shoulder sweater joins her. They both point at a display of mango cotton candy, discussing the visuals on the bag that indicate real fruit pieces. The background is filled with yellow and red price tags and various Japanese-style snack products on metal shelves. (3) The scene transitions to a home living room environment where both women are seated at a wooden table. They have opened the cotton candy bags; one is vibrant pink and the other is a pale yellow. They use their fingers to pull and stretch the fluffy, fibrous texture to inspect the interior. (4) Close-up shots reveal dark pink and orange dried fruit bits embedded within the center of the torn cotton candy masses. The women take bites of the snacks, reacting with wide smiles, raised eyebrows, and animated hand gestures to describe the taste and the unique contrast between the soft candy and firm fruit.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 真果實棉花糖 口感超夢幻. [Subtitle]: 他這個唐吉訶德的棉花糖. (2) [Subtitle]: 他說是真的水果"狗"肉. [Variety]: 真的水果"狗"肉. (3) [Subtitle]: 果肉. [Variety]: 果肉. (4) [Subtitle]: 真的水果果肉 不加色素. (5) [Subtitle]: 49元 吃看看有沒有好吃. (6) [Subtitle]: 你們看 可以直接看到 芒果的果肉在這裡耶 酷斃了. [Variety]: 鮮. 彈. (7) [Subtitle]: 他後面有原味的 這個就沒有加水果 有點可惜. (8) [Subtitle]: 看起來像柔軟的小毛巾. (9) [Subtitle]: 袋裝棉花糖 草莓 芒果. (10) [Subtitle]: 它觸感好好哦 真的很像那個 緊縮的棉花糖. (11) [Subtitle]: 就是像烘衣機 有時候要清洗清那個棉絮. (12) [Subtitle]: 你毀了我的食慾. [Variety]: 火焰特效. (13) [Subtitle]: 哇 裡面有包餡 滿滿草莓果乾. (14) [Subtitle]: 他芒果是真的果乾哎 我吃到草莓果乾了 在這裡. (15) [Subtitle]: 嗯 我覺得很好吃 好像凍乾. (16) [Subtitle]: 雖然是少量果實添加在裡面 可是口感變得更有趣 以及它既綿密 外面又有點紮實的觸感 好讚哦. (17) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它中間有一點那種芒果凍乾跟芒果醬的感覺 讓你會覺得你在吃 那種芒果雪花冰. (18) [Subtitle]: 哇 芒果超好吃 趕快去買.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators appearing as the main hosts in both the store and home scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Woman 1: Wearing a grey striped button-up shirt and a bucket hat. Woman 2: Wearing a dark blue off-the-shoulder sweater and later a pink beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Initially a crowded DON DON DONKI supermarket snack aisle with bright, colorful shelves. Later, a cozy home living room with a dining table and soft warm lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced female voices begin speaking in Traditional Chinese with high energy. A cheerful, major-key synthesizer BGM with a steady 4/4 drum beat plays at a moderate volume. A new phase is triggered by a sudden 'ding' sound effect used for emphasis. (2) The sounds of crisp plastic rustling (broadband noise) are prominent as the products are handled. The female speakers use rising intonation and frequent exclamations. The background noise of the retail environment remains low, well below the primary vocal signal. (3) A sharp 'whoosh' transition effect occurs, signaling a change in the acoustic environment to a quieter room floor. A brief male voice interjects with a teasing, humorous tone, contrasting the female hosts' high-pitched excitement. Rustling sounds continue as packaging is torn open. (4) Loud vocalizations of surprise and delight ('Wow!', 'Ah!') are heard as the hosts taste the snack. The music maintains its upbeat tempo. The audio design is hyper-dense with speech, BGM, and post-production SFX throughout the entire duration.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Discovery -> Purchase -> Product Reveal -> Tasting & Review -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a unique snack product (fruit-filled cotton candy) from Don Don Donki. The video emphasizes the product's novelty—the inclusion of real dried fruit—and the creators' positive physical and verbal reactions to encourage others to try it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video follows a personal vlog format typical of lifestyle creators sharing shopping finds without explicit sponsorship markers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-arousal vocal delivery and fast-paced editing characteristic of social media short-form content. The chemistry between the two hosts and the humorous 'dog meat' slip-of-the-tongue at the beginning serve to hook the audience's attention.
